title: speccheck: species-aware quality-control reporting for bacterial genomes
description: speccheck collects outputs from bacterial genome quality-control and species-assignment tools, applies species-aware and generic QC criteria, and produces reproducible CSV, HTML, and XLSX reports. Version 1.3.0 includes a completed 100-sample read-backed Escherichia coli case study, QualiBact E. coli v1 compatibility reporting, Fastp and BUSCO parser support, GHRU-assembly downstream collection, and worked-example documentation assets.
